status_code.description: HTTP status code for redirects (default: 302 Found)

preserve_query.description: Append the original query string to the redirect target (default: true)

path.description: Exact path to match. If omitted, the rule matches all requests.

prefix.description: Path prefix to match. The matched prefix is stripped and the remainder is appended to target. Mutually exclusive with 'path'.

target.description: Redirect target URL or path (e.g., 'https://example.com/new' or '/new-path')

status_code.description: Override the top-level status_code for this rule

rules.description: Redirect rules evaluated in order. First match wins.
